title: Who the hell is Loren Lorrain Briscoe
display_title: Who the hell is Loren Lorrain Briscoe
wikitext:
[]: Who the hell is Loren/Lorrain Briscoe??             Quote Post by shaiilo » Sat Jun 14, 2025 3:09 pm yoo is anyone still active on this site...?? anyway, i just wanted to ask for info on who Loren/Lorrain Briscoe is, it's a similar mystery on ariana i think her name was, the mystery woman that sang komm susser todd. cmiiw, but i think ik she's part of a lil thing called Loren and MASH, the people responsible for singing 'If I Can't Be Yours'' in the intermission for The End of Evangelion, that she was on an album called Shiro's Songbook, and of course, Evangelion Vox and i think one called Black Beauty, outside of Evangelion, but i might be wrong. ik she has an insta account, but i think she stopped posting on it (can't say for sure cuz my dads a computer geek so he does everything in his power to make apps ''not for my age'' COMPLETELY inaccessible, theres only a few ways to get around it..) but.. that's literally all i know?? when i search her up, this cool rapper navnavsworld also shows up, and i think loren also posts her on her insta, and theres a playlist on soundcloud with some of her songs by a profile literally named ''lorrain briscoe''.. i'm wondering if she's her manager or something. yes, i went on the Eva Wiki, not a lot of info there either. there's this snapshot of her singing at the evangelion symphony, and i can't fond the original source or video anywhere.. i'm not the best at digging online for info, so im a bit stuck on this. does she release any new music? does she have kids? a husband? a WIFE?? id be satisfied with ANYTHING, honestly. it's a shame cuz, im not sure if im right, but i THINK shes from London which is craycray cuz im from london too! AND she's black! like me! yknow how HARD it is to find a normal black person who likes evangelion???? very btw. AND she has a lovely voice and she's combined one of my two favourite things together, RnB and Evangelion, like huh??? who is this lovely woman??? yea, sorry for the yippity yappity yap session. just a veeeeery bored but curious teen here.. thanks 4 reading XD

[]: Re: Who the hell is Loren/Lorrain Briscoe??             Quote Post by asakuraikun » Sun Dec 07, 2025 12:09 am Hi, Believe me, your dad is doing the best for you. Internet can be great, but it can also be gritty. But about Lorrain Briscoe, you can check various credits she has on music on IMDB , Discogs as Loren , Discogs as Lorrain and VGMdb . About her personal life, we don't know much indeed. We know she apparently was born in 1974 and is indeed from London. She also seem to work/run a Reggae Project in London. In this project, they list her location as Peckham & Hackney, which as far as I know are locations within London. Sorry, don't know much about London's geography. Her instagram is private, but you can find it here . I'm linking because her project I mentioned before usually tags her . Just take care because apparently there's another artist from London with same name that shows up if you look for her name. She posts on Threads with that same account, and there has been recent posts there. edit: messed up links
